title: Plated
tagline: Beautiful restaurant websites, built in minutes.
description: Plated is a full-stack SaaS + Electron desktop app that lets restaurant owners generate, customise, and deploy a beautiful Astro-powered static site without touching code. A 4-step onboarding wizard captures the restaurant's details, theme preference, and conversion goals — then Plated builds a fully deployable, SEO-optimised site. No developer required.
story: Built because restaurant owners shouldn't need a developer to have a great website. Every existing option is either too expensive, too generic, or too technical. Plated fills that gap with hospitality-first themes, a guided onboarding wizard, Stripe-gated plans, one-click Vercel/Netlify deploys, and custom domain verification — all in a product named and designed for the people who actually use it.
journey: Started as NexCMS — a headless CMS experiment — and fully pivoted once the real problem became clear: restaurant owners don't need a CMS, they need a product that speaks their language. The rebuild focused entirely on hospitality: a warm visual identity (amber, sienna, cream), an onboarding wizard that asks about reservations and delivery links rather than DNS records, and a name — Plated — that signals the output rather than the tool.
forWho: Restaurant owners, food truck operators, bar and café owners, and hospitality businesses who want a professional website without hiring a developer.

detailedSpecs.architecture: pnpm monorepo with five packages: saas (Next.js 15 + Clerk + Stripe + Drizzle + Resend), builder (Electron + Vite + React), generator (schema → Astro file tree), astro-output (Astro project builder + ZIP exporter), types (shared TypeScript interfaces). Custom domain routing via Next.js middleware reading the Host header and rewiring to /sites/[domain]/[[...slug]].
modes: SaaS — app.plated.io, browser-based dashboard, onboarding wizard, project management, one-click Vercel/Netlify deploy
Desktop — Electron builder app, offline-capable, auto-updates via electron-updater and GitHub Releases
themes: Hearth — warm amber tones, serif headlines, intimate and chef-driven
Editorial — clean whites, strong photography, refined and elevated
Bistro — bold colours, energetic layout, casual neighbourhood feel
keyFeatures: 4-step onboarding wizard — restaurant name, cuisine, city, description, theme, CTA preference
Plan-gated project limits — Free / Pro / Agency tiers via Stripe
One-click deploy to Vercel or Netlify with provider API integration
Custom domain verification via DNS TXT record (_nexcms.{domain} → nexcms-verify={token})
CNAME routing through cname.plated.io with middleware Host-header rewriting
Transactional email (welcome, deploy success/failure, upgrade, payment failed) via Resend
Electron desktop builder with splash screen, auto-updater, and offline support
SEO-optimised Astro output with sitemap and robots.txt
roadmap: Done — monorepo scaffold, shared types, Astro generator core
Done — Stripe billing (Free/Pro/Agency), plan gates, Clerk auth
Done — Electron builder with splash screen, auto-updater, IPC handlers
Done — One-click Vercel + Netlify deploy with provider API wiring
Done — Custom domain verification (DNS TXT) + CNAME middleware routing
Done — Onboarding wizard (4-step) with project creation API
Done — Transactional email templates (welcome, deploy, billing)
Next — Logo upload, menu items, and opening hours in onboarding wizard
detailedSpecs.deployTarget: Vercel (SaaS) + one-click Vercel / Netlify for restaurant sites + GitHub Releases for Electron builds
